label: Immediate Rejection - No Interest
description: The customer immediately rejects the offer with 'Not Interested' within the first few seconds, displaying no engagement. These calls end quickly with no further dialogue. May represent bad data or an inconvenient time for the contact.
improvement_opportunity: Refine lead qualification criteria. A/B test different introductory scripts focusing on immediate value or relevancy. Verify contact information is accurate.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Not Interested

label: Already Insured - Quick Rejection
description: Customer immediately states they are already insured. Very little attempt is made to explore alternative solutions. The call ends quickly.
improvement_opportunity: Train agents to quickly identify potential gaps in their existing coverage or highlight unique benefits (e.g., specific disease coverage, better preventative care) to initiate a porting discussion. Gather competitor policy names for focused comparisons.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Already Insured

label: Qualified Lead - Callback Scheduled
description: Customer expresses genuine interest, asks questions, and engages in a meaningful conversation. A callback is scheduled, indicating a potentially high-value lead. Initial profiling questions are answered.
improvement_opportunity: Ensure seamless handoff to the callback team with detailed notes on customer needs, preferences, and any objections raised. Personalize the follow-up presentation to maximize conversion.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: HIGH, Arc Pattern: Rising, Objection: None

label: Time Constraint - Callback Requested
description: Customer expresses a time constraint early in the call and requests a callback at a more convenient time. The initial engagement is minimal.
improvement_opportunity: Optimize callback scheduling processes (consider automated scheduling tools). Provide agents with scripts to gather minimal but essential information during the initial call to personalize the callback and improve conversion rates.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Slight Rise, Objection: Time Constraint
sample_texts: Hello? Hello. कभी क्यों हो? अभी नहीं हो सकता है. ज
मैं अभी मैं अभी मंदिर में बैठा हूं. थोड़ी देर के ब

label: Discount Offered - Immediate Rejection
description: A discount or incentive is immediately offered, but the customer rejects the offer anyway with minimal engagement. The discount does not overcome their initial disinterest.
improvement_opportunity: Rethink the immediate discount strategy. Focus on needs-based selling and building value before offering discounts. Tailor the offer based on perceived needs instead of a generic discount.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Not Interested

label: Profiling Started - Uncertain End
description: The customer begins answering profiling questions, showing initial interest, but the call ends prematurely due to technical issues, customer distraction, or other interruptions. The outcome is uncertain.
improvement_opportunity: Improve call stability and minimize drop-off rates. Train agents to quickly re-engage if a disconnection occurs. Implement a system for immediate follow-up on interrupted calls.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: MEDIUM, Arc Pattern: Rising, Objection: Varies
sample_texts: Hello. This call is now being recorded.
नमस्ते, मेरी किस्मत क्या है? हां जी, हां जी, बोल र

label: Gatekeeper - Uncertain Reach
description: Agent speaks with a third party (e.g., family member) who acts as a gatekeeper. The gatekeeper may or may not pass on the message to the intended recipient, leading to an uncertain outcome. The decision-maker is unavailable.
improvement_opportunity: Develop strategies for engaging with gatekeepers effectively. Train agents to politely ask for the best time to call back and speak directly with the intended recipient.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: None
sample_texts: नहीं, अभी निखिल जी घर पर नहीं है.
नहीं नहीं, अभी हमीद घर पर नहीं आए.
If you record your name and reason for calling, I'
Thanks, Karf. Please stay on the line.

label: Time Constraint - No Callback
description: The customer states they are busy, implying rejection. They do not request a callback or schedule any follow-up activities. The conversation is short and ends without a clear opportunity for further engagement.
improvement_opportunity: Agents need to make one last ditch effort to offer scheduling a call quickly. Perhaps also immediately offer an immediate, very brief quote to provide some value.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Time Constraint
sample_texts: नहीं madam जी, संतोष जी अभी hospital में है.

label: High-Value Lead - Family Details Shared
description: Customer shows strong interest and provides detailed family information. A callback is scheduled with a specialized 'expert' agent to further discuss specific needs and options. High likelihood of a positive outcome.
improvement_opportunity: Ensure detailed comparative quotes are prepared for the callback agent, highlighting the best options based on the customer's family details. Brief the expert agent thoroughly on the customer's needs and preferences.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: VERY_HIGH, Arc Pattern: Rising, Objection: None
sample_texts: हां जी भाई नहीं बोल रहा हूं.

label: Initial Interest - Abrupt Rejection
description: The customer initially shows some interest, such as answering a few questions, but then abruptly rejects the offer without a clear explanation. This may happen after policy disclaimers. The call ends without a sale.
improvement_opportunity: Analyze call recordings to identify common triggers for the abrupt rejection (e.g., specific words, disclaimers). Train agents to proactively address these concerns. Simplify disclaimers or present them positively.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: MEDIUM, Arc Pattern: Rise and Fall, Objection: Not Interested

label: Frustrated - DNC Request
description: Customer expresses frustration, possibly due to frequent calls or a negative past experience, and demands to be put on the Do-Not-Call list. This results in a negative interaction.
improvement_opportunity: Immediately honor the DNC request. Improve call list management practices to reduce call frequency and avoid contacting individuals with a history of negative interactions.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Not Interested

label: Already Insured - Persuasion Possible
description: Customer states they are insured. Agent attempts to explore alternate coverage or 'porting' opportunities. This typically results in the agent providing custom comparisons of current coverage versus new coverage.
improvement_opportunity: Train agents on how to ask further qualifying questions about existing health plan coverage and then focus on the gaps to create tailored upgrade or 'porting' offers.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: MEDIUM, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Already Insured

label: Wrong Number / Not Available
description: The agent reaches someone other than the intended recipient or finds the recipient unavailable and unable to proceed. A message is usually requested, or the call terminates abruptly.
improvement_opportunity: Improve data validation and lead qualification processes to minimize instances of reaching the wrong person. Verify contact information before initiating the call.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: None
sample_texts: नहीं अभी वह घर पर नहीं है बाहर गए थे.
This call is now being recorded.
You record your name and reason for calling, I'll

label: Initial Interest Fading - Rejection
description: The customer shows initial interest, but it quickly fades, leading to a rejection of the offer. This may be due to confusion or lack of perceived value after some conversation. Interest is lost quickly.
improvement_opportunity: Improve the clarity and conciseness of the value proposition. Focus on key benefits and address potential concerns proactively. Shorten the pitch and tailor it to their needs.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Rise then Fall, Objection: Not Interested

label: Polite But Firm Rejection
description: Customer politely declines the offer using phrases such as 'no, thank you.' The rejection is firm but respectful, and the conversation is very short. The customer demonstrates no intention to engage further.
improvement_opportunity: Acknowledge their politeness and end the call gracefully. Do not try to overcome objection, as they are firmly set. Consider a follow-up email or message, but do not call back.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Not Interested
sample_texts: जी बात कर रहे हैं बोलिए.

label: Confusion - Unclear Value
description: The customer expresses confusion or doesn't fully grasp the offer's value, leading to an uncertain or negative outcome. The call ends without a clear commitment or rejection, simply confusion.
improvement_opportunity: Simplify the language and present the benefits more clearly. Use relatable examples. Ensure agents pause and ask for confirmation of understanding regularly.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: MEDIUM, Arc Pattern: Unclear, Objection: None

label: Uncertain Availability - Short Call
description: A very short call where the customer indicates they might check their availability or consider the offer later, resulting in an uncertain outcome. They don't commit to a follow-up or callback.
improvement_opportunity: Immediately offer to help check availability or schedule a quick follow-up at a specific time. Send a brief reminder email or text message summarizing the key benefits.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: UNCERTAIN, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: None
sample_texts: If you record your name and reason for I'll see if
Hi if you record your for calling I'll see if this

label: Price Sensitivity - Immediate Rejection
description: Customer immediately rejects the offer, citing high price as the main reason. There is little or no attempt to understand their budget or needs. The call terminates very quickly.
improvement_opportunity: Equip agents with flexible payment options and tiered-down coverage options that they can quickly present. Train agents to ask qualifying questions regarding budget constraints early in the call.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Price Concern

label: Language Barrier - Communication Failure
description: A significant language barrier prevents effective communication, leading to customer frustration, misunderstanding and rejection of the offer. The customer may be confused or unable to understand the agent.
improvement_opportunity: Employ multilingual agents or implement real-time translation tools. Collect language preference data and route calls accordingly.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Language Barrier

label: WhatsApp Information Request - Lead
description: The customer expresses initial interest but requests information to be sent over WhatsApp or text message due to time constraints. There is no guaranteed follow-up by an agent, but potential exists.
improvement_opportunity: Establish clear protocols for handling WhatsApp/text follow-ups. Provide agents with templates and guidelines for effective digital communication to convert leads. Set expectations with the customer about follow-up steps.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: MEDIUM, Arc Pattern: Rising, Objection: Time Constraint
sample_texts: Currently away from calls, WhatsApp is preferred.

label: Spouse/Third Party Rejection
description: The agent speaks with a third party (e.g., spouse) who expresses no interest on behalf of the intended customer. The decision-maker is unavailable, and the call ends with a rejection from the third party.
improvement_opportunity: Improve pre-call data to identify the correct contact person. Train agents to politely request a callback when the intended customer is available or suggest alternative contact methods.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: LOW, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Not Interested
sample_texts: नहीं मैं उसका मैं उसका wife हूं.

label: Price Sensitive - Discount Focus Only
description: Customer shows interest only in discounts and free services. They reject the paid plan but may express interest in free alternatives or services. Price is the primary deciding factor.
improvement_opportunity: Highlight the value and long-term benefits of the paid plan versus the limited benefits of the free service. Consider a payment plan or lower coverage option that meets their budget.
sample_profile_match: Engagement: MEDIUM, Arc Pattern: Flat, Objection: Price Concern
